phrases.english: Good morning, did you sleep well?
Excuse me, where is the restroom?
Can you repeat, a little slower?
Take your time, there's no need to rush
That's great, I'm really happy for you
I'm sorry, that was my mistake, really
Could you please help me with this?
phrases.korean: 이거 좀 도와줄 수 있어요, 부탁드려요

phrases.english: No problem, don't worry, I'll handle it
Be brave, try anyway, don't look back
phrases.korean: 용기 내, 어쨌든 시도해, 뒤돌아보지 마

phrases.english: Take the step, you'll learn, you'll grow
phrases.korean: 한 걸음 내딛어, 배우고, 성장할 거야

phrases.english: Face fear, take one step, keep moving
phrases.korean: 두려움을 마주해, 한 걸음 내딛고, 계속 나아가

phrases.english: Speak up, one word, can change things
phrases.korean: 말해 봐, 한 마디가, 상황을 바꿀 수 있어

phrases.english: Start now, small steps, big differences follow
phrases.korean: 지금 시작해, 작은 걸음들이, 큰 변화를 만들어

phrases.english: I choose you, every single day
You're my calm, you're my home
Hold my hand, and never let go
phrases.korean: 내 손을 잡아줘, 그리고 절대 놓지 마

phrases.english: Small moments, mean everything to me
I miss you, every minute of every day
phrases.korean: 매 순간, 매일 네가 보고 싶어
오늘 한 걸음, 내일 더 강해져

phrases.english: Make time daily, build new habits
Be kind to yourself, keep learning
Choose kindness, even on hard days
Let go, make room for joy
You are enough, today and always
Breathe, let the tension softly go
Feel, the calm within you, gently growing
phrases.korean: 느껴봐, 네 안의 고요가 부드럽게 자라나

phrases.english: Let go, one worry at a time, slowly
Sit still, hear your breath, find peace
phrases.korean: 가만히 앉아, 숨소리를 듣고, 평화를 찾아

phrases.english: Softly, forgive yourself, move forward gently
phrases.korean: 조용히, 자신을 용서하고, 부드럽게 앞으로 가

phrases.english: Hi there, good to see you
Long time no see, how have you been?

phrases.korean: 다시 오신 걸 환영해요, 보고 싶었어요

phrases.english: Nice to meet you, I'm glad you're here
One step daily, reach your goal
I study, to speak with locals
I practice, to sound more natural
I save money, to travel in Korea
I study grammar, to write better
How much is this, in total?
Do you have this, in another color?
Can I try this on, please?
Do you accept cards, or cash?
Take small steps, see big progress
phrases.korean: 작은 걸음으로 시작해, 큰 진전이 온다

phrases.english: Mistakes teach you, they are not failures
phrases.korean: 실수는 배움이야, 다음엔 더 잘할 기회야

phrases.english: Speak now, improve a little every day
One word today, one step closer tomorrow
phrases.korean: 오늘 한 단어, 내일은 한 걸음 더 가까워져

phrases.english: Listen more, speak with growing confidence
phrases.korean: 더 많이 들어, 자신감 있게 말해

phrases.english: Thank you, you made my day
Thanks, you were a big help
I'm grateful, you listened to me
I appreciate it, more than you know

phrases.korean: 숨 쉬고, 기다려, 모든 게 진정돼

phrases.english: One step, be patient, keep going
Wait, let time do its work
Excuse me, does this go to Incheon Airport?
How much is the fare, per person?
Can I pay, with a credit card?
Is there a place to store luggage, here?
Where's platform three, for trains to Busan?
Could I see the menu, please?
I'll have the spicy ramen, please
Tell a story, with one line
A small kindness, brightens someone's day
phrases.korean: 작은 친절이, 누군가의 하루를 밝게 해요

phrases.english: Listen with care, it really helps
Offer a hand, without asking why
Share a smile, spread a little warmth
Dance a little, lift your spirit
Grow every day, celebrate small wins
Try, fail, learn, try again, keep growing
phrases.korean: 시도해요, 실패해요, 배우고, 다시 도전해요, 계속 성장해요

phrases.english: Small steps, steady pace, big changes follow
phrases.korean: 작은 걸음, 꾸준한 속도, 큰 변화가 따라와요

phrases.english: Ask questions, stay curious, grow faster
phrases.korean: 질문하세요, 호기심을 유지하세요, 더 빠르게 성장해요

phrases.english: One habit, one month, a better you
phrases.korean: 한 가지 습관, 한 달, 더 나은 나

phrases.english: Be steady, trust your own pace
Hold firm, even in heavy storms
My mother, always cooks for us
Big sister, laughs loudly, always happily
Younger brother, play games with me, today
Grandparents, tell stories from childhood, gently
phrases.korean: 할아버지, 할머니, 어린 시절 이야기를 해요

phrases.english: You and me, always a team
You and I, against the whole world
phrases.korean: 너와 나, 세상에 맞서 함께 있어

phrases.english: Your smile, it lights up my day
phrases.korean: 네 미소가, 내 하루를 환하게 밝혀

phrases.english: Forever together, isn't long enough for us
I love the way, you laugh
phrases.korean: 네가 웃는 그 모습, 난 사랑해

phrases.english: Stay close, right here by my side
Start small, celebrate every little win
Try again, you're learning more each day
phrases.korean: 다시 시도해, 매일 더 배우고 있어

phrases.english: Believe in yourself, keep moving forward
Mistakes are progress, learn and move on
You belong here, your voice matters
phrases.korean: 여기가 네 자리야, 네 목소리가 중요해

phrases.english: Hold on, brighter days are coming
phrases.korean: 기다려, 더 밝은 날들이 올 거야

phrases.english: Take a breath, hope never leaves you
One step, toward a brighter tomorrow
Small light, guides you through darkness
Keep going, hope grows with you
Try, fail, adjust, then try again
Set small goals, review them weekly
Breathe, reset, choose your next move
phrases.korean: 숨 쉬고, 마음을 정리해, 다음을 선택해

phrases.english: Is there a discount, for members?
Do you have a smaller size, please?
I'll take this, could you hold it?
Can I return this, if needed?
Breathe deeply, slow down, find your center
phrases.korean: 천천히, 깊게 숨 쉬고, 중심을 찾아요

phrases.english: Stand firm, bend when needed, stay steady
phrases.korean: 단단히 서고, 필요하면 구부리며, 안정 유지해요

phrases.english: Work hard, rest often, keep your life balanced
phrases.korean: 열심히 일하고, 자주 쉬면서, 삶의 균형을 유지해요

phrases.english: Small steps daily, steady progress, balanced life grows
phrases.korean: 작은 걸음, 매일 꾸준히, 균형 잡힌 삶이 자라요

phrases.english: Balance work, play often, cherish quiet moments
phrases.korean: 일과 균형, 자주 놀고, 조용한 순간을 소중히 여겨요

phrases.english: Practice today, you'll surprise yourself tomorrow
phrases.korean: 오늘 연습해, 내일 네가 놀랄 거야

phrases.english: Be curious, ask questions, learn faster
phrases.korean: 호기심 가져, 질문해, 더 빨리 배워

phrases.english: Slow down, pronounce each syllable clearly
Fail fast, learn quickly, try again
phrases.korean: 빨리 실패해, 빨리 배워, 다시 시도해

phrases.english: Celebrate tiny wins, keep moving forward
phrases.korean: 작은 승리 축하해, 계속 앞으로 나아가

phrases.english: That sounds good, let's go ahead and do it
What's your opinion, please tell me honestly
I don't know, maybe we can decide later
It's nice to finally meet you, thank you
I'll be right back, please wait here
I listen, to understand Korean songs
I practice daily, to build confidence
I learn phrases, to order food easily
I study, to pass the language test
I learn culture, to feel more at home
Breathe in, slowly. Breathe out, gently.
Hello there, nice to meet you.
Imagine new worlds, then build them.
Let ideas flow, don't hold back.
Your unique spark, let it shine.
Connect the dots, find the pattern.
Create with passion, live with joy.
Try again, you can do it.
Don't give up, just a little more.
Push forward, with all your might.
Small steps, lead to big changes.
Good things take time, wait a little.
phrases.korean: 좋은 일은 시간이 걸려요, 조금만 기다려요.

phrases.english: Slow and steady, wins the race.
Be patient, the reward will come.
Rome wasn't built, in a day.
Save a little, spend a little.
Take a deep breath, then go.
You are stronger than you think.
It was, very delicious. Thank you.
It was my fault, I apologize.
I hope you can forgive me.
This means, a lot to me.
May your spirit blossom, like a spring flower.
Let your laughter, echo like clear water.
phrases.korean: 맑은 물처럼, 웃음 소리 울려 퍼지길.

phrases.english: Walk steadily, like a mountain stream.
May your kindness, spread like a fragrant breeze.
Grasp the current, like a river finds sea.
Let joy, flow like a river.

phrases.korean: 내일 숨 쉬면, 새 기회 열려요.

phrases.english: Small steps now, become big steps later.
Listen to your heart, it knows.
A gentle smile, warms the soul.
A breath held, a strength known.
phrases.korean: 숨 한번, 잠시 멈추고, 강함 알게.

phrases.english: Break the mold, new path, found.
Just focus on learning numbers, maybe ten.
One hour's study, builds inner strength.
phrases.korean: 한 시간 공부, 내면 힘 키워요.

phrases.english: Three attempts later, finally see light.
Twenty more tries, will get better.
Ditch the scroll, find your soul.

phrases.korean: 보이지 않는 노력, 보이지 않는 힘.

phrases.english: You shine so brightly, for me.
Just thinking, of you makes me happy.
Lost in your eyes, every time.
Long time no see. Speak again.
How are you? Your turn rises.
From earth, to table so soft.
Seed sprouts, world changes. Small voice, giant truth.
phrases.korean: 씨앗 틔워, 세상 바꿔. 작은 소리, 큰 진리.

phrases.english: Mountain's song, quietly teaches. River's current, strength grows.
phrases.korean: 산의 노래, 말없이 가르쳐. 강줄기, 힘을 키워.

phrases.english: Sky's canvas, brush new. Star's light, path finds.
phrases.korean: 하늘 캔버스, 붓 새로운. 별빛, 길을 찾아.

phrases.english: Dewdrop mirror, clear mind. Echo flower, gentle call.
phrases.korean: 이슬 거울, 맑은 마음. 메아리 꽃, 부드러운 부름.

phrases.english: Forest's hush, wisdom waits. Sunray paints, morning glow.
phrases.korean: 숲의 속삭임, 지혜를 기다려. 햇살 그리네, 아침 빛.

phrases.english: My older sibling, please guide me.
Breathe in peace, let go, stress.
My heart calls, like a seabird.
Beneath the moon, our souls meet.
Like morning dew, you refresh me.

phrases.korean: 지금 이 순간, 품어줄 수 있어요.

phrases.english: Share light, like fireflies at dusk.
World is noisy, find your quiet.
Ask for recommendation, try chef's choice.

phrases.korean: 한 입 시도, 새 맛 발견.
깊이 숨 쉬어, 더 환하게 웃어.

phrases.english: Let go of blame, find peace.
Don't wait to live, experience now.
Upload art, not just your day.
Forge forge your path, speak new.

phrases.korean: 자세히 들어, 말 안 한 이야기.

phrases.english: Say it once, get it right.
Today's word brightens, the whole day.
Thank you, for this learning spark.
Breathe it in, make it yours.
Feel the rhythm, join the flow.
Wipe away the dust, bloom again.
Old wounds heal, like the earth.
Soothe the stones, let them rest.
That's important now and later too.
This one is tough, you got this.
Your path clears, bit by bit.
One new word, feels so good.
Let past be past, embrace now.
Listen to your heart, then move.
Order this dish, flavor explosion awaits.
Try the special, dare to taste.
Love blooms, softly in the heart.
My heart beats, only for you.
Each step reveals, a brighter path.
New words unfurl, like delicate buds.
Find your voice, in serene sound.
Speak a new word, unlock yourself.
Dare to get it wrong, learn faster.
phrases.korean: 틀리기를 두려워 말고, 빨리 배울 뿐.

phrases.english: Feel the rhythm, find your voice.
Ink your dreams, on dawn's page.
Fabric feels like a whisper, lovely.
Lost in the shimmer, what found beauty.
Echoes of elegance, call to me.
A perfect fit, a silent sigh.
Cherish this moment, you. It's yours.
Don't recall past, just vibe now, dear.
phrases.korean: 과거 생각 말고, 지금 그냥 느껴.

phrases.english: Day by day? So it's like this.
After this scene, comes another, friend.
phrases.korean: 이 다음 장면, 또 와, 친구.

phrases.english: Tonight is special, enjoy it, please.

phrases.korean: 더 잘 들어봐요. 할 수 있어요.

phrases.english: Though steps stumble, my spirit stands.
Sun after rain, a quiet bloom.
Sowing seeds, a green sprout grows.
Each breath, a brand new start.
Mind your breath, find your flow.
See the step. Then the stair.
Say it, bravely. Try it, boldly.
Hear, then echo. Try, then master.
A small word, a big leap.
Seeds of hope, sprout in silence.
Work life balance, find your calm.

phrases.korean: 속삭이는 바람, 거대한 모래 언덕을 빚다.
빗방울은 새겨, 느리고 푸른 이끼 자라.

phrases.english: Footprints lighten, on sands of time.
Moss hugs stone, so do years.
Work deep today, rest easy tonight.
phrases.korean: 오늘 깊이 일해요, 밤 편히 쉬어요.

phrases.english: Screen time down, real life up.
Feed your joy, not your worry.
Bloom like a lotus, rise higher.
Flow like a river, find its way.

phrases.korean: 바 lam 의 진언, 귀 기울여.

phrases.english: Like a gentle breeze, offer solace.
Plant seeds of compassion, watch kindness grow.
Glow like the moon, soft presence.
